title: Audit renderer security configuration
description: Inspect BrowserWindow/webview webPreferences and the preload bridge for isolation, nodeIntegration, and over-broad exposure.
body: Use when reviewing an Electron app's security. Actions: read every BrowserWindow/webview creation for contextIsolation, nodeIntegration, sandbox, and webSecurity settings; inspect the preload for what contextBridge exposes; and check for remote content loaded into privileged renderers. Report each unsafe setting and over-broad exposure with file/line. Do not modify code. This skill exposes capability only and must not run the packaged app against untrusted content without runtime permission. Validation signals include all renderers isolated and a minimal preload surface. Risk boundary: nodeIntegration:true, contextIsolation:false, or a raw-ipcRenderer preload are blocking security findings; report and recommend the safe configuration rather than shipping.
